# Chandrasekhar Jinendran — AI Specialist

> Chandrasekhar Jinendran is an AI Specialist who designs and ships practical AI
> systems — autonomous agents, workflow automations, voice bots, and custom AI
> assistants — taking ideas from concept to a deployed product. The focus is
> speed and outcomes: going from idea to a working, deployed AI MVP rather than a
> proof of concept.

- Name: Chandrasekhar Jinendran
- Role: AI Specialist (Generative AI, agentic AI, automation, voice AI)
- Website: https://chandrasekharjinendran.com/
- Status: Available for AI projects

## About

Chandrasekhar specializes in applied Generative AI: building AI agents, workflow
automations, and human-like voice assistants that replace repetitive work and
ship as real products. He works hands-on across the modern AI stack — prompt
engineering, agentic AI, the Model Context Protocol (MCP), local LLM deployment,
and agentic coding with Claude Code. Eight AI products have been shipped end to
end.

## Services

- **AI Agents & Automations** — Custom AI agents and automations that replace
  repetitive, manual work; "AI employees" (agentic systems that handle tasks end
  to end); built across agentic AI, MCP, and Claude Code.
- **AI Voice Assistants** — Real-time, human-like conversational voice agents on
  Retell AI, tuned with system and meta prompting and wired into workflows via
  webhooks and APIs.
- **AI MVPs & Integration** — AI MVPs taken from idea to a working, deployed
  product, fast; business-workflow automation with n8n; AI integrated into
  existing systems through MCP servers and APIs.

## Selected Projects

- **Ledger MCP** (MCP Server) — A Model Context Protocol server (Python · FastMCP
  · SQLite) exposing 7 governed expense-tracking tools to Claude behind a policy
  layer: per-transaction and monthly caps, a category allowlist, an
  emergency-stop freeze, and a full audit trail of every allowed and denied
  write. 7 offline tests green.
- **JobSignal** (RAG App) — A RAG web app (FastAPI + vector search + Claude API)
  that ingests job postings and answers cross-posting skill queries with cited
  sources. Deployed live, indexing a growing set of postings.
- **Personal AI Clone** — A digital clone of a real person, combining
  AI-generated video, voice, and image into one convincing, interactive persona.
- **Lead Management Automation** — An end-to-end website lead-capture and
  management system built with n8n agents: capturing, qualifying, and routing
  leads automatically.
- **AI Employee** (Agent) — An agentic AI that autonomously handles repetitive
  tasks end to end — an always-on teammate that does the busywork.
- **Custom MCP Servers & Micro-Apps** — MCP servers and micro-apps built inside
  Claude that fetch and act on live data, extending the assistant with real,
  custom capabilities.
- **Real-Time Voice Bot** — A human-like conversational voice agent built on
  Retell AI, shaped with system and meta prompting for natural, real-time
  dialogue.
- **AI Productivity Assistant** — A personal AI assistant built from scratch,
  combining agents, MCP, automation, and voice into one working product.

## Tech Stack

- **AI & orchestration:** Claude, Claude Code, Model Context Protocol (MCP), n8n,
  Antigravity, Open Claw
- **Models, voice & data:** Ollama, MSTY, Retell AI, APIFY, KITE, GitHub,
  Perplexity
- **Backend & deploy:** Python, FastAPI, vector search, SQLite, API & webhook
  integration, local LLM deployment, AI MVP delivery
- **Prompt & GenAI:** prompt engineering, system & meta prompting, generative AI
  fundamentals, inference pipelines, AI image/video/voice generation, voice
  cloning

## Credentials

- Outskill — AI Certification (Outskill AI Generalist Accelerator Program):
  hands-on work across the modern AI stack — agentic AI, automation, and applied
  generative AI.
